name: Boudewijn van der Veen
summary: Highly skilled Senior iOS Engineer with over 8 years of experience in building high-performance, scalable mobile applications. Expert in Swift and SwiftUI with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences in the fintech and e-commerce sectors.

experience.title: Senior iOS Developer
experience.description: Leading the development of core payment SDKs, improving transaction processing speed by 30% and mentoring junior developers on clean architecture and unit testing.

experience.title: iOS Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained key features for the flagship travel app, focusing on performance optimization and implementing complex UI components using UIKit and Combine.

experience.title: Mobile Developer
experience.description: Collaborated on the mobile file-sharing platform, focusing on background task management and seamless cloud integration for iOS users.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
